mapping_notes: Every component is treated as needed-to-function until operator review removes or downgrades it.
Physical/hardware candidates require CAD and engineering review before final package promotion.
Software/system candidates require code/module/API mapping before final package promotion.

systems.evidence_needed: accepted source pack or live promoted evidence
systems.label: Evidence Ingestion System
systems.purpose: bring source material into the design process with traceable provenance

systems.label: Component Mapping System
systems.purpose: map functional requirements to current technologies and interfaces

systems.evidence_needed: prototype validation, component fit, deployment controls
systems.label: Feasibility Governance System
systems.purpose: separate buildable-now systems from speculative or future-state concepts

systems.label: Blueprint Export System
systems.purpose: convert reviewed design into technical specs, blueprints, and implementation phases
